name: Plush Doll with Red Shorts - Cloud Island™
description:
Gift your little one a cute partner and bed buddy, the Plush Doll with Red Shorts from cloud island™. This plush doll comes wearing a striped short-sleeve tee and red shorts for an eye-catching look. Soft to cuddle, this doll toy is suggested for ages newborn and above.

cloud island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
